# apple-music-cleaner

> Bulk-remove Apple Music favorites or wipe your library using web-player session tokens. No paid Apple Developer account. CLI + local web UI.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/README.md): Installation, token setup, CLI commands, web app, limitations
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Guidance for coding agents working on this repo

## Use cases

- Remove all favorited tracks at once (CLI or web UI)
- Remove stale favorites with no recent plays (`--no-plays-within 90`)
- Remove dislikes only (`dislikes` command)
- Filter by artist, title pattern, keep-list, exclude purchased
- Export cleanup targets to CSV before deleting
- Wipe entire library or scoped categories (`--category songs,playlists`)
- Dry-run preview in CLI (default) and web UI (Preview buttons)

## Commands

- `npm start` — list favorites (dry run)
- `npm start -- --execute` — remove all favorites
- `npm start -- --no-plays-within 90 --execute` — remove stale favorites
- `npm start -- dislikes --execute` — remove all dislikes
- `npm start -- wipe --category songs --execute` — delete songs only
- `npm start -- wipe --dislikes-only --execute` — clear dislikes without deleting items
- `npm start -- probe-history` — inspect recent-played API depth
- `npm run web` — local web UI with preview mode on port 3000

## Limitations

- Uses the same private API as music.apple.com (not officially documented)
- Deletions are permanent
- Recent-played history is bounded; `--no-plays-within` is approximate
- Cannot delete the system Favorite Songs playlist
- Full play history and recommendation profile are not clearable via API

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT
